sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95120" key="skopiwro/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκοπ-ιωρός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n95120.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">watcher</tr_>, ibid., restd. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:1:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
